summary: Phase D0 impl correct, complete, safe. 6 GOAL clauses implemented with TDD RED-first tests. No forbidden imports, defensive error handling, multi-tenant scoping via ShopProfileRepo. Zero regression (3 new files, 0 RISK_PATHS).
correctness: Parse/logic sound. _parse_emit_reply validates tool args defensively + raises when emit_reply missing. _build_system_prompt handles missing Shop/Profile gracefully. Message order system->history->user correct.
completeness: All 6 GOAL clauses implemented AND test-pinned (intent/confidence-from-LLM, persona-injection, history-threading, enum superset, raise-on-missing, import-boundary).
safety: shop_id from param only (not LLM/body); zero imports to sender/channels/policy_gate/orchestrator (AST-enforced); no fabricated confidence; ShopProfileRepo SQL-level scope; enum-gap test prevents silent sensitive-intent bypass.
